meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solve 'Can't Debug' with AI (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to leverage freelance pitching to solve complex debugging issues using Antigravity and Claude Code for faster delivery.
content.answer_block: When you hit a debugging wall, stop spinning your wheels. Shift your strategy: use freelance pitching to frame the bug as a project requirement, then leverage Claude Code to automate the architectural fix. By treating bugs as technical debt deliverables, you maintain client trust while accelerating resolution times significantly.
content.intro:
You are deep in the trenches, the client's deadline is breathing down your neck, and you are staring at a stack trace that makes no sense. The 'can't debug' paralysis is a silent killer of freelance careers. Every hour spent chasing a phantom error is an hour you aren't shipping features or billing for high-impact work.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started pitching the solution? By transforming debugging into a structured delivery phase, you regain your authority. We will use Antigravity and Claude Code to convert complex technical hurdles into streamlined project milestones that keep your clients happy and your sanity intact.

steps.title: Audit the Technical Debt
steps.description: Before pitching a fix, quantify the scope of the bug. Use Antigravity to generate a summary of the failing module to present as a 'technical refinement' to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for recursive logic errors and generate a concise technical summary suitable for a client progress update.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'find all files related to the failing module and summarize the stack trace'

steps.title: Pitch the Refactor as a Feature
steps.description: Frame the debugging process as a performance optimization. Clients prefer 'System Stability Enhancements' over 'I can't fix this bug'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional client communication proposing a 'Stability and Performance Refactor' to resolve current system latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'what are the architectural benefits of refactoring the current failing controller?'

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Points
steps.description: Use Claude Code to surgically isolate the bug without disrupting the rest of the production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite that mocks the environment for the identified failing module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a unit test that isolates the current bug in isolation'

steps.title: Automate the Resolution
steps.description: Deploy Claude Code to suggest and apply the fix, ensuring the code adheres to your established style guide.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the proposed fix from the CLI and ensure it follows clean-code principles and modular design.

steps.title: Final Validation and Delivery
steps.description: Run the final verification and package the results into a professional report for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a 'Resolution Report' detailing the fix applied and the performance improvements gained.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify all tests pass and generate a summary of changes'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'debugging log' file; clients pay for transparency, not just the final code.
Use Claude Code's `--dry-run` flag to preview architectural changes before committing them to your repository.
When a bug is deep, pitch a 'Discovery Phase'—it turns a stressful debugging session into a paid consulting engagement.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation for your fixes; it increases your perceived value as a senior developer.
Never ship a fix without an automated regression test; it prevents the client from coming back with the same issue twice.
content.next_steps: Integrate these AI workflows into your standard boilerplate to ensure every future project starts with automated testing and clear communication templates.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your freelance schedule and start controlling the narrative. With the right tools and a professional pitch, you can turn any technical hurdle into a profitable milestone. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
